title: ACEF Transparency Marking Payload
description: Payload schema for transparency_marking records. Captures provider-side technical marking of AI-generated content per EU AI Act Art. 50, EU Labelling Code of Practice, and China CAC measures. Includes normative minimum required fields per spec Section 3.1.5. Supports the marking_standards_compliance variant via the marking_subtype discriminator field.

marking_scheme_id.description: Identifier for the marking scheme applied (e.g., 'c2pa-content-credentials', 'cn-cac-implicit-label-2025'). Enables testable verification by auditors.

metadata_container.description: Where the marking metadata is stored (e.g., 'xmp/c2pa-manifest-store', 'exif', 'id3', 'file-header').

watermark_applied.description: Whether a digital watermark was applied to the content.

verification_method_ref.description: Pointer to the verification tool or API artifact for checking the marking.

marking_parameters_ref.description: Pointer to detailed marking configuration artifact.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction for which this marking is intended (e.g., 'EU', 'CN'). Enables jurisdiction-specific marking validation.

label_exception.description: Exception handling for cases where explicit labels are omitted (e.g., by user request under CAC rules).

applied.description: True if an explicit label was omitted.

log_retention_triggered.description: True if the exception triggers additional retention obligations.

robustness_parameters.description: Robustness parameters for the marking (e.g., compression tolerance, cropping tolerance).

interoperability_standard.description: Interoperability standard the marking conforms to.

marking_subtype.description: Discriminator for payload variants. 'standards_compliance' for marking_standards_compliance variant.

standards_applied.description: Standards applied to the marking (for marking_standards_compliance variant).

conformity_evidence.description: Evidence of conformity to marking standards (for marking_standards_compliance variant).

state_of_the_art_assessment.description: Assessment of state-of-the-art alignment (for marking_standards_compliance variant).

implicit_label_fields.description: China CAC implicit metadata label fields.
